senses.definition: items of clothing and accessories for men

examples.x: The haberdashery displayed an array of men's accessories, including ties, pocket squares, and cufflinks, adding a touch of sophistication to any ensemble.

senses.definition: a long row of torn fabric in tights or stockings
a kind of fold in a piece of cloth that is doubled over on itself and fixed in its place
expensive or showy clothes and accessories, especially those worn on special occasions
the way in which a piece of clothing fits the wearer

examples.x: The dress had a perfect fit, hugging her curves in all the right places.
He preferred a loose fit for his casual wear, finding it more comfortable than tight clothing.
Before buying jeans, it’s important to check the fit to ensure they are neither too tight nor too loose.
She had the shirt tailored for a better fit after noticing it was too baggy.
A good fit is essential for athletic gear to provide support and enhance performance during workouts.

senses.definition: clothes made of waterproof material, keeping us dry in the rain
a type of comfortable clothing suitable for relaxing or lounging at home
casual clothing designed to be worn while relaxing or playing sports
pieces of clothing designed to be worn in bed
clothing for women
things worn on the feet, such as shoes, boots, etc.

examples.x: The store had a wide selection of footwear, ranging from athletic sneakers to elegant heels.
He slipped off his footwear before entering the sacred temple, as a sign of respect.
The hiker wore sturdy footwear with thick treads to navigate the rugged terrain.
She admired the intricate embroidery on the traditional footwear worn by the dancers during the cultural festival.
The fashion designer's latest collection included innovative footwear designs that merged style with comfort.

senses.definition: clothing for men
clothing items designed to be worn while swimming
the outfit worn outside casually or for sport activities

examples.x: She bought new sportswear for her gym sessions.
The brand specializes in high-quality sportswear for runners.
He wore sportswear to stay comfortable during the football match.
Comfortable sportswear is essential for yoga and pilates.
His closet is filled with breathable sportswear for every season.

senses.definition: items worn over other clothes, particularly when we are outdoors, such as jackets and coats

examples.x: She bought new outerwear for the winter season.
The store has a wide selection of outerwear for all weather conditions.
He wore heavy outerwear to stay warm in the snow.
Stylish outerwear can enhance any outfit.

senses.definition: clothes that we wear under all the other pieces of clothing right on top of our skin

examples.x: He accidentally put his underwear on inside out.
He bought a pack of plain white underwear for everyday wear.
I need to buy new underwear because my old ones are worn out.
I prefer to wear comfortable cotton underwear.
The store sells a variety of underwear styles, including briefs and boxers.

senses.definition: the clothes that someone is wearing for a special occasion

examples.x: The wedding invitation requested that all guests wear formal attire to the ceremony.
For the gala, she chose an elegant gown that was the epitome of sophisticated attire.
The company’s annual dinner is a black-tie event, so I’ll need to rent a tuxedo as my attire for the evening.
At the award ceremony, the celebrities’ attire ranged from chic cocktail dresses to lavish designer suits.
The theme of the party was ‘vintage Hollywood’, and everyone arrived in attire reminiscent of the golden age of cinema.

senses.definition: a set of two or more items of clothing that are designed to be worn together and match in color, pattern, or style
the quality of being elegant by style

examples.x: The event was full of glamour, with everyone showcasing their chic in stunning attire.
He admired the chic of the Parisian streets, where fashion was always on display.

senses.definition: the way a garment is cut, giving it a particular style

examples.x: The designer's signature style is evident in the clean lines and precise cut of each garment.
The tailored cut of the suit accentuated his physique, giving him a polished and professional appearance.
She prefers dresses with a loose, flowing cut that allows for freedom of movement and comfort.
The asymmetrical cut of the blouse adds a modern twist to the classic design, making it stand out.
The couture gown featured intricate draping and a dramatic cut, showcasing the designer's skill and artistry.

senses.definition: a category of clothing items made from stretchy fabric, such as socks, stockings, tights, and leggings, worn on the legs and feet

examples.x: She bought a pair of sheer hosiery for the evening event.
The store has a dedicated section for women’s hosiery.
He prefers durable hosiery for everyday wear.
She wore hosiery to complete her formal outfit.

senses.definition: an item, such as a bag, hat, piece of jewelry, etc., that is worn or carried because it makes an outfit more beautiful or attractive

examples.x: A belt can be both a practical and stylish accessory for jeans or dresses.
Adding a scarf as an accessory can make a simple outfit more elegant.
He chose a stylish watch as his favorite accessory to complete his outfit.
Sunglasses are a popular accessory for protecting your eyes from the sun.
The store offers a wide selection of fashion accessories, including belts, scarves, and hats.

senses.definition: all of the clothes that someone owns

examples.x: She decided to organize her wardrobe, sorting her clothes by season and color.
His extensive wardrobe includes suits, casual wear, and athletic gear for every occasion.
After the shopping spree, her wardrobe was filled with new, trendy outfits.
He donated half of his wardrobe to charity, realizing he no longer wore most of the clothes.
She loves updating her wardrobe each season to keep up with the latest fashion trends.

senses.definition: a piece of clothing for a particular event or purpose
a person's belongings such as jewelry, clothing, etc.
the things we wear to cover our body, such as pants, shirts, and jackets

examples.x: He always wears comfortable clothes when he goes for a run.
I need to wash my clothes before I can wear them again.
My mother asked me to fold my clothes and organize them in my closet.
She received many compliments on her stylish clothes.
She was excited to buy new clothes for the summer season.

senses.definition: the items that we wear, particularly a specific type of items

examples.x: Some cultures have traditional clothing that holds significant cultural value.
The boutique specializes in handmade clothing and accessories.
The clothing brand is known for its sustainable and ethical manufacturing practices.
They donated their old clothing to a local charity to help those in need.
When traveling to a hot climate, it's essential to pack lightweight and breathable clothing.

senses.definition: an item of clothing that is worn on the body, including various types of clothing such as shirts, pants, dresses, etc.

examples.x: The designer created a stunning garment that was the highlight of the fashion show.
She carefully folded each garment before placing it in her suitcase, ensuring they remained wrinkle-free.
The traditional garment worn during the ceremony was rich in cultural significance and history.
He admired the intricate embroidery on the vintage garment, a testament to the craftsmanship of a bygone era.
She selected a lightweight garment for her trip to the tropics, prioritizing comfort in the warm climate.

senses.definition: any item that is worn to change or alter the appearance or to hide someone's identity
a set of two matching items that are designed to be used together or regarded as one

examples.x: She bought a new pair of earrings to match her evening gown.
He couldn't find a matching pair of socks in the laundry basket.
The pair of gloves she wore was perfect for the cold weather.
They enjoyed their time at the beach with a new pair of sunglasses.
The couple received a beautiful pair of candlesticks as a wedding gift.

senses.definition: one of the standard measures according to which clothes and other goods are made or sold

examples.x: She bought a dress online and chose the size that matched her measurements.
What size shoes do you wear?
The dress was too tight; she needed a larger size.
The gloves come in different sizes to accommodate various hand sizes.
She wears a size small in shirts.

senses.definition: a framework, typically with rails, hooks, or pegs, on which items can be hung
clothes, used particularly when being sold

examples.x: The boutique offered a wide selection of high-quality apparel for men and women.
He sorted through the racks of apparel, searching for the perfect outfit for the job interview.
The company specialized in athletic apparel, catering to fitness enthusiasts.
She donated her gently used apparel to the local charity organization.
The fashion show featured the latest trends in designer apparel from around the world.

senses.definition: cloth or fabric used to make different items of clothing

examples.x: She chose a soft, silky material for her new dress.
The tailor recommended a durable material for the work uniforms.
They imported the finest material from Italy for their fashion line.
The designer selected a vibrant material to create the evening gowns.
He searched for a waterproof material to make the outdoor jackets.

senses.definition: a typically repeating arrangement of shapes, colors, etc., regularly done as a design on a surface

examples.x: The wallpaper had a beautiful floral pattern that added elegance to the room.
The intricate pattern on the rug depicted scenes from ancient mythology.
His shirt had a bold stripe pattern that made it stand out in the crowd.
The artist created a mesmerizing mosaic pattern on the courtyard floor using colorful tiles.

senses.definition: a shape that slightly widens toward the bottom
a hole made in a part of the body in order to insert a ring, stud ,etc. for ornamentation
objects such as necklaces, bracelets or rings, typically made from precious metals such as gold and silver, that we wear as decoration

examples.x: He bought a lovely piece of jewelry for his mother's birthday.
She admired the beautiful jewelry displayed in the shop window.
The artisan crafted unique and handmade jewelry using silver and gemstones.

senses.definition: a valuable stone that is cut and polished to be used in jewelry making
a rare, naturally occurring metallic chemical element that has high economic value such as gold and silver
(plural) jeans or other clothing made of denim

examples.x: She slipped into her favorite pair of denim jeans before heading out for a casual evening with friends.
His outfit was simple but stylish: a white t-shirt and dark denim shorts.
The fashion show showcased a range of denim overalls, highlighting their versatility and durability.

senses.definition: a small piece of cloth or paper used for cleaning
ordinary everyday clothing worn by individuals who are not in uniform or do not hold a specific dress code
clothing specifically designed to be worn while performing manual labor or other physical work
the styles and trends of clothing, accessories, makeup, and other items that are popular in a certain time and place

examples.x: Fashion trends can vary greatly depending on the region and culture.
The 80s fashion was known for its bold colors and dramatic styles.
The fashion magazine features tips on how to dress for different body types.
They opened a boutique that sells high-end fashion brands.

senses.definition: a set of clothes that one wears together, especially for an event or occasion

examples.x: She carefully selected her outfit for the interview, wanting to make a good impression.
His outfit for the party included a sharp suit and a stylish tie.
She accessorized her outfit with a statement necklace and matching earrings.
He received many compliments on his outfit at the wedding, which he had chosen with great care.

senses.definition: any item of clothing that covers the head, such as a hat, helmet, etc.
the clothing designed for women who are 5'3" (160 cm) or shorter

examples.x: The boutique offers a great selection of petites for those who are shorter.
Her wardrobe is filled with the latest petites, tailored to complement her height.
She always looks for the petite when browsing through fashion magazines.
The sale included discounts on all petites, making it a great time to shop.

senses.definition: a decorative covering worn on the head, typically worn as a symbol of status or cultural significance
the trade name of a company that makes designer clothes

examples.x: She always dreams of wearing dresses from her favorite fashion label.
The new collection from the renowned label was showcased at Fashion Week.
He prefers clothes from a label known for its innovative designs.
The label's signature logo was easily recognizable on the handbag.

senses.definition: a type of shoe that can be easily put on without requiring laces or buckles
mourning clothes worn by a widow, typically consisting of black garments and accessories
a type of formal dress code for evening events, which includes a black tailcoat jacket, black pants, a white wing-collared shirt, a white bow tie, and black patent leather shoes
the special set of clothes that all members of an organization or a group wear at work, or children wear at a particular school

examples.x: The employees at the hotel wear a professional uniform.
The factory workers had to wear protective uniforms and helmets for safety reasons.
The police officer's uniform was decorated with shiny badges and a badge.
The security guards' uniforms made them easily recognizable and approachable.
The students wear a school uniform every day.

senses.definition: any decorative item worn around the neck, such as ties, scarves, or necklaces
clothing items made by interlocking yarn using knitting techniques such as sweaters, cardigans, and scarves
clothing and accessories worn for activities on or near the beach
any item of clothing designed to be worn on the lower part of the body

examples.x: She packed her favorite bikini bottom for the beach trip.
The jogger bought a new pair of athletic bottoms for her morning runs.
He chose comfortable shorts as his bottom for the summer picnic.
The fashion show featured a variety of stylish bottoms, including skirts and trousers.
She paired her blouse with a matching bottom for a coordinated outfit.
